calendar.matters:
HEARING ON ERIC NEAL CHILDERS' PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-15-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The matter came on for Change of name of Petitioner Eric Neal Childers.

Dept.505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: D. Carter; Matter not reported

Petitioner Eric Neal Childers appeared in pro per, was placed under oath and testified.

Petition for change of name and gender filed September 18, 2024.

Order to show cause filed September 18, 2024.

Notice of hearing filed March 12, 2025.

The Court addresses the petitioner.

The Petitioner provides testimony.

After reviewing the petition, hearing the testimony and there are no objections filed, The Court grants Petitioner's request for change of name.

Order Recognizing change of name change and for issuance of new certificates signed and filed this day.

HEARING ON ERIC NEAL CHILDERS' PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME

Off Calendar Apr-02-2025 Off Calendar
